title: Hibiscus sciadiolepidus

It belongs to the genus Hibiscus, a group of tropical and subtropical plants known for their showy flowers. Hibiscus sciadiolepidus is a species of hibiscus native to tropical Africa. The classification of this species also places it within the tribe Hibisceae, which is a subgroup of the Malvaceae family. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Hibiscus sciadiolepidus with other plants in the Malvaceae family.

intro:
